tier_definitions.1: Critical — Tenant-wide write to identity, mail, or files (application context); full admin
tier_definitions.2: High — Tenant-wide read OR user-scoped write to sensitive resources
tier_definitions.3: Moderate — User-scoped read to sensitive resources, or write to bounded resources
tier_definitions.4: Low — Profile, openid, basic identity claims, offline_access

scopes.rationale: Application-type: read/write every mailbox in tenant without user context
Delegated: read/write only the consenting user's mailbox
Application-type: read every mailbox in tenant — full mail exfiltration
Delegated: read consenting user's mail — single-user exfiltration
Application-type: send mail as any user — tenant-wide impersonation
Delegated: send mail as consenting user — single-user impersonation
Application-type: read mail metadata (subject, sender) across all mailboxes
Delegated: read mail metadata for consenting user only
Application-type: read/write all files in all site collections and OneDrive — full tenant file control
Delegated: read/write all files the user can access
Application-type: read all files in tenant — complete file exfiltration
Delegated: read all files user can access — user-scoped exfiltration
Delegated: read/write files user can access (same effective scope as Files.ReadWrite.All delegated in practice)
Delegated: read files user can access
Application-type: full directory write — create/modify/delete users, groups, roles
Delegated: directory write with user context — still tenant-wide identity modification
Application-type: read entire directory — full tenant enumeration
Delegated: read directory — tenant structure and user enumeration
Application-type: modify all user profiles — identity manipulation at scale
Delegated: modify all users — tenant-wide identity write
Application-type: read all user profiles — full tenant user enumeration
Delegated: read all users — directory enumeration
Read only the signed-in user's profile — basic identity
Read basic profiles of all users (name, photo, email) — limited enumeration
Application-type: manage all groups — access control modification at tenant scale
Delegated: manage groups user is member of — bounded by user context
Application-type: read all groups and membership — access structure enumeration
Delegated: read groups — user's group context
Delegated: read group memberships — org structure visibility
Full control of all SharePoint sites — tenant-wide content write even in delegated context
Application-type: read/write all SharePoint sites — full content control
Delegated: read/write SharePoint sites user can access
Application-type: read all SharePoint content — site-level exfiltration
Delegated: read SharePoint sites user can access
Application-type: read/write all calendars in tenant
Delegated: read/write consenting user's calendar
Application-type: read all calendars — meeting intelligence at tenant scale
Delegated: read user's calendar — schedule visibility
Application-type: read/write all contacts in tenant — PII at scale
Delegated: read/write user's contacts
Full Exchange Web Services access as user — legacy full-mailbox scope
Can grant delegated permissions to other apps — consent-chaining enabler
Application-type: grant permissions without user context — privilege escalation
Application-type: assign app roles — can grant itself or others any permission
Application-type: manage all applications — create/modify app registrations and service principals
Application-type: manage directory roles — can assign Global Admin
Delegated: read organization info — tenant metadata
Delegated: read hidden group memberships — reveals concealed access structures
Delegated: read user's relevant people — social graph from user perspective
Delegated: read all users' relevant people — broader social graph
Delegated: read presence status of all users — activity surveillance
Delegated: create Teams channels — structural change to collaboration
Delegated: read basic channel info — team structure visibility
Delegated: read basic team info — team enumeration
Delegated: read chat members — reveals private communication participants
Application-type: read/write all chats — full communication interception at tenant scale
Application-type: read all chats — full communication surveillance
Application-type: read all channel messages — Teams content exfiltration
Delegated: install/remove Teams apps — can introduce malicious apps to team
Delegated: manage own app installation in teams — bounded to self
Delegated: create tabs in Teams channels — low risk structural change
Delegated: read/write user's tasks — may contain sensitive to-do items
Delegated: manage user's Forms — may contain sensitive survey data
Delegated: read all usage reports — reveals tenant-wide activity patterns
Delegated: read app catalog — low sensitivity metadata
Delegated: submit apps to catalog — can introduce apps to org catalog
Delegated: manage external connections for Microsoft Search — can inject content into search results
Delegated: read sensitivity labels and policies — reveals data classification structure
Delegated: read available sensitivity labels — low sensitivity metadata
Delegated: submit print jobs — low risk
Delegated: read basic print job info — low sensitivity
Delegated: read shared printers — infrastructure enumeration, low sensitivity
Delegated: manage taxonomy term store — can modify org-wide metadata structure
Delegated: access selected file storage containers — bounded but file access
Delegated: read Power BI datasets — may contain sensitive business intelligence
Delegated: execute ML models — access to AI/ML infrastructure
Delegated: read basic education assignments — education-sector scope
Delegated: read basic education roster — education-sector scope
Delegated: read/write all group conversations — communication interception
Delegated: manage user state data — session and activity state manipulation
Delegated: act as the user against the resource — full delegated access to resource API
OpenID Connect sign-in — minimal identity assertion
Read user's basic profile — name, picture
Read user's email address — basic identity claim
Maintain access via refresh token — enables persistent access but not additional scope
